---
title: "conditionalcorr"
generated: true
description: "Correlation of `X` conditioned on the variables in `Y`."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.covariance`](../nitrix-stats-covariance.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:conditionalcorr -->
```python
conditionalcorr(X: Num[Array, '... c obs'], Y: Num[Array, '... d obs'], **kwargs) -> Num[Array, '... c c']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:conditionalcorr -->
Correlation of `X` conditioned on the variables in `Y`.

Normalised version of [`conditionalcov`](../nitrix-stats-covariance/conditionalcov.qmd): the conditional
covariance is divided by the outer product of the residual
standard deviations, yielding conditional correlations with unit
diagonal.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:conditionalcorr -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `X` | `Num` | `...` × `c` × `obs` | — | Variables whose conditional correlation is sought. |
| `Y` | `Num` | `...` × `d` × `obs` | — | Conditioning variables to residualise out of `X`. |
| `**kwargs` | `Any` | — | `{}` | — |

**Returns** `Num` — shape `...` × `c` × `c`. Conditional correlation matrix, `(..., c, c)`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:conditionalcorr -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `c` | feature channels (channels-last) |
| `obs` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `d` | spatial dimension (2 or 3) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
